scripts.build:1st: cross-env OUT_DIR=dist/gameconfigs BASE_PATH=/gameconfigs/ BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173/gameconfigs VITE_CONFIG_KEY=gameconfigs VITE_INSTANCE_LABEL=1st vite build
scripts.build:2nd: cross-env OUT_DIR=dist/gameconfigs2nd BASE_PATH=/gameconfigs2nd/ BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173/gameconfigs2nd VITE_CONFIG_KEY=gameconfigs2nd VITE_INSTANCE_LABEL=2nd vite build
scripts.build:3rd: cross-env OUT_DIR=dist/gameconfigs3rd BASE_PATH=/gameconfigs3rd/ BASE_URL=http://localhost:4173/gameconfigs3rd VITE_CONFIG_KEY=gameconfigs3rd VITE_INSTANCE_LABEL=3rd vite build
scripts.build:all: tsc -b && npm run build:1st && npm run build:2nd && npm run build:3rd
